Class Criteria

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.relational.core.query.Criteria
All Implemented Interfaces:
CriteriaDefinition
public class Criteria extends Object implements CriteriaDefinition
Central value class for creating criteria predicates. It follows a fluent (and immutable) API style so that you can easily chain together multiple criteria. Static import of the Criteria.property(…) method will improve readability as in where(property(…).is(…).

The Criteria API supports composition with a NULL object and a static factory method. Example usage: 

Criteria.from(Criteria.where("name").is("Foo"), Criteria.from(Criteria.where("age").greaterThan(42)));
rendering: 
WHERE name = 'Foo' AND age > 42
Since:
2.0
Author:
Mark Paluch, Oliver Drotbohm, Roman Chigvintsev, Jens Schauder, Christoph Strobl

  • Method Details

    • empty

      public static Criteria empty()
      Static factory method to create an empty Criteria.
      Returns:
      an empty Criteria.

    • from

      public static Criteria from(Criteria... criteria)
      Create a new Criteria and combine it as group with AND using the provided Criterias.
      Returns:
      new Criteria.

    • from

      public static Criteria from(List<Criteria> criteria)
      Create a new Criteria and combine it as group with AND using the provided Criterias.
      Returns:
      new Criteria.

    • where

      public static Criteria.CriteriaStep where(String column)
      Static factory method to create a Criteria using the provided column name.
      Parameters:
      column - Must not be null or empty.
      Returns:
      a new Criteria.CriteriaStep object to complete the first Criteria.

    • where

      public static <T,P> Criteria.CriteriaStep where(TypedPropertyPath<T,P> property)
      Static factory method to create a Criteria using the provided path.
      Parameters:
      property - Must not be null.
      Returns:
      a new Criteria.CriteriaStep object to complete the first Criteria.
      Since:
      4.1

    • and

      @CheckReturnValue public Criteria.CriteriaStep and(String column)
      Create a new Criteria and combine it with AND using the provided column name.
      Parameters:
      column - Must not be null or empty.
      Returns:
      a new Criteria.CriteriaStep object to complete the next Criteria.

    • and

      @CheckReturnValue public <T,P> Criteria.CriteriaStep and(TypedPropertyPath<T,P> property)
      Create a new Criteria and combine it with AND using the provided path.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      a new Criteria.CriteriaStep object to complete the next Criteria.

    • and

      @CheckReturnValue public Criteria and(CriteriaDefinition criteria)
      Create a new Criteria and combine it as group with AND using the provided Criteria group.
      Parameters:
      criteria - criteria object.
      Returns:
      a new Criteria object.
      Since:
      1.1

    • and

      @CheckReturnValue public Criteria and(List<? extends CriteriaDefinition> criteria)
      Create a new Criteria and combine it as group with AND using the provided Criteria group.
      Parameters:
      criteria - criteria objects.
      Returns:
      a new Criteria object.

    • or

      @CheckReturnValue public Criteria.CriteriaStep or(String column)
      Create a new Criteria and combine it with OR using the provided column name.
      Parameters:
      column - Must not be null or empty.
      Returns:
      a new Criteria.CriteriaStep object to complete the next Criteria.

      Returns:

      @CheckReturnValue public Criteria ignoreCase(boolean ignoreCase)
      Creates a new Criteria with the given "ignore case" flag.
      Parameters:

      Returns:
      a new Criteria object

    • getPrevious

      public @Nullable Criteria getPrevious()
      Specified by:
      getPrevious in interface CriteriaDefinition
      Returns:
      the previous Criteria object. Can be null if there is no previous Criteria.
      See Also:
